point 
N = Attachment Point met; TrOOP subsequently reduced below the OOP threshold due to payment 
amounts from non-EGWP other payers reported in PLRO (reported by EGWPs only) 
Blank = Attachment point not met 

COMMENT: This variable was required for all PDEs through the end of 2010, and became optional starting in 2011. 

The value may differ from the more detailed BENEFIT_PHASE variable, which is a CCW-derived field 
that is available for all years.
